response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience with 17 years in development, including roles at re:cinq contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, which aligns with the role's requirement for AI and cloud expertise. However, while his experience is broad, there is limited explicit evidence of specialized AI products or platforms built from scratch, and his entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is more focused on geospatial tools rather than AI. His academic background in computer science is solid, but not AI-specific.
strengths: 17 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, demonstrating AI-related technical involvement
Proven track record of building and maintaining scalable platforms (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz pricing tools)
concerns: Limited direct evidence of recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI beyond AI-agent tooling
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is geospatial, not AI-focused, which may not fully align with the role's requirements
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields, though experience partially compensates
